text: The commission may adopt rules to implement this subchapter and to provide requestor refunds.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 202. Control of Transp. Assets
##### § 202.032 — Rules

The commission may adopt rules to implement this subchapter and to provide requestor refunds.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The commission may adopt rules to implement this subchapter and to provide requestor refunds.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
